steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is D, 36.

steps.title: Isolate the square root term
steps.content:
Subtract 28 from both sides of the equation:
$$\sqrt{w} + 28 - 28 = 34 - 28$$
$$\sqrt{w} = 6$$

steps.title: Square both sides to solve for w
steps.content:
To eliminate the square root, square both sides:
$$(\sqrt{w})^2 = 6^2$$
$$w = 36$$
That is the correct answer.
